ceo.workday.header.title: Workday Overrides
ceo.workday.header.description: Configure holidays and short working days that affect update expectations.
ceo.workday.states.loading_description: Fetching holiday and short-day settings for the selected period.
ceo.workday.states.error_description: Could not load holiday and short-day overrides.
ceo.workday.summary.holidays_hint: Full day off or no update expected.
ceo.workday.summary.short_days_hint: Reduced working hours or shortened day.
ceo.workday.summary.targeting_hint: How many overrides apply to all members versus selected members.
ceo.workday.list.title: Overrides for {{month}} {{year}}
ceo.workday.list.description: Each entry changes how update tracking treats a specific date.
ceo.workday.list.no_note: No note provided for this override.
ceo.workday.empty.title: No overrides yet for {{month}} {{year}}
ceo.workday.empty.description: Create a holiday or short-day rule so calendars stop treating those dates as missing workdays.
ceo.workday.guide.title: How It Works
ceo.workday.guide.description: Use these rules to control whether updates are expected on a date.
ceo.workday.guide.holiday_description: Mark a date as a holiday when no update should be expected. Calendars should treat it as an off day instead of a missing day.
ceo.workday.guide.short_day_description: Use a short day when working hours change. You can still require updates or turn them off for that shortened date.
ceo.workday.guide.member_targeting_descr: Choose all members for company-wide holidays, or select one or more members when the override is specific to a subset of the team.
ceo.workday.guide.member_options_error: Member options could not be loaded. You can still review existing overrides, but creating member-specific entries may fail until this list reloads.
ceo.workday.dialog.create_description: Create a holiday or short working day for all members or selected members.
ceo.workday.dialog.edit_description: Update the selected holiday or short-day entry.
ceo.workday.form.note_placeholder: Optional note shown in calendars and focus panels.
ceo.workday.form.no_update_required_hint: Use this for holidays or shortened days with no reporting.
ceo.workday.form.update_required_hint: Use this when the day is shortened but reporting should still happen.
ceo.workday.form.applies_to_all: This override will apply to every member in the company.
